grant_type: Non-repayable enterprise grant up to Rs 25,000

criteria.plain: This scheme is exclusively for women.

criteria.rule_text: Applicant must be a permanent resident of Odisha.
criteria.plain: You must be a permanent resident of Odisha.

criteria.rule_text: Applicant must be a member of a Self-Help Group.
criteria.plain: You must belong to a Mission Shakti SHG.
criteria.fix_action: Join a Mission Shakti SHG in your ward/village (10-20 women).

criteria.rule_text: SHG must be active for 6+ months for bank loan linkage.
criteria.plain: Your SHG needs to be at least 6 months old.
criteria.fix_action: Continue SHG membership until it reaches 6 months.
criteria.meanwhile: Prepare your business documents while you wait.

criteria.rule_text: Applicant must provide an Aadhaar card.
criteria.plain: You need your Aadhaar card on file.
criteria.fix_action: Add your Aadhaar card to your documents.

criteria.rule_text: Applicant must provide an SHG membership certificate.
criteria.plain: You need your SHG membership certificate on file.
criteria.fix_action: Get an SHG membership certificate from your group and add it to your documents.

criteria.rule_text: Applicant must provide a business quotation or estimate.
criteria.plain: You need a quotation or cost estimate for your business.
criteria.fix_action: Get a written quotation for your business setup and add it to your documents.

criteria.rule_text: Applicant must provide an estimate of monthly revenue.
criteria.plain: You need to provide your monthly revenue estimate.
criteria.fix_action: Add your monthly revenue estimate to your profile.

criteria.rule_text: Applicant must provide an estimate of monthly expenses.
criteria.plain: You need to provide your monthly expenses estimate.
criteria.fix_action: Add your monthly expenses estimate to your profile.
